      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "5.2 Part de l’utilisation des principales céréales entre\n",
        "l’alimentation humaine et animale"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "IV6uafrWaPAS"
      },
      "id": "IV6uafrWaPAS"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# 1. Données de ton projet (exemples de proportions classiques pour ces céréales)\n",
        "data = {\n",
        "    'Céréale': ['Riz (Eq Blanchi)', 'Millet', 'Blé', 'Sorgho', 'Seigle', 'Avoine', 'Maïs', 'Orge'],\n",
        "    'Nourriture': [0.79, 0.77, 0.67, 0.41, 0.33, 0.17, 0.13, 0.05],\n",
        "    'Aliments pour animaux': [0.07, 0.11, 0.19, 0.46, 0.49, 0.69, 0.57, 0.66],\n",
        "    'Autres usages': [0.14, 0.12, 0.14, 0.13, 0.18, 0.14, 0.30, 0.29]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame(data)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Paramètres du graphique\n",
        "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 8))\n",
        "colors = ['#88D8B0', '#FFCCAC', '#92A8D1'] # Ta palette pastel contrastée\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Construction des barres empilées\n",
        "df.plot(x='Céréale', kind='barh', stacked=True, color=colors, ax=ax, width=0.6)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Ajout des pourcentages à l'intérieur des barres (uniquement pour la partie Nourriture)\n",
        "for i, (p, label) in enumerate(zip(ax.patches[:8], df['Nourriture'])):\n",
        "    width = p.get_width()\n",
        "    if width > 0.05: # On affiche si la barre est assez large\n",
        "        ax.text(width/2, i, f'{label*100:.0f} %',\n",
        "                va='center', ha='center', color='#2C3E50', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Cosmétique pour ressembler à ta pièce jointe\n",
        "ax.set_title(\"5.2) Répartition de l’utilisation par type de céréale (2017)\",\n",
        "             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', pad=20)\n",
        "ax.set_xlabel(\"Pourcentage\")\n",
        "ax.legend(bbox_to_anchor=(1.0, 1.0), loc='upper left')\n",
        "plt.gca().invert_yaxis() # Pour avoir le Riz en haut comme sur ton image\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='x', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 807
        },
        "id": "sVBlT__bagga",
        "outputId": "ef5c418a-b92f-4539-98ba-0c73f9d8ad96"
      },
      "id": "sVBlT__bagga",

      "outputs": [

          "output_type": "display_data",

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "6. Liste des 10 pays où la proportion de personnes en état\n",
        "de sous-nutrition est la plus forte en 2017"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "P4o1p-8aecOh"
      },
      "id": "P4o1p-8aecOh"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import matplotlib.cm as cm\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Tes données (Source FAO 2017)\n",
        "pays = [\n",
        "    'Haïti', 'Corée du Nord', 'Madagascar', 'Tchad',\n",
        "    'Libéria', 'Burkina Faso', 'Afghanistan',\n",
        "    'Congo', 'Sierra Leone', 'Rwanda'\n",
        "]\n",
        "proportions = [48.2, 47.6, 41.0, 37.5, 37.2, 36.8, 35.6, 34.1, 32.2, 31.5]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Création de la nuance de rouge\n",
        "# .Reds permet de générer un dégradé élégant\n",
        "colors = cm.Reds(np.linspace(0.8, 0.4, len(pays)))\n",
        "# 3. Création du graphique\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7))\n",
        "bars = plt.barh(pays, proportions, color=colors, height=0.7)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Ajout des chiffres au bout de chaque barre\n",
        "for bar in bars:\n",
        "    width = bar.get_width()\n",
        "    plt.text(width + 0.5, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,\n",
        "             f'{width}%', va='center', fontweight='bold', color='#2C3E50')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Inverser l'axe pour avoir le plus critique en haut\n",
        "plt.gca().invert_yaxis()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Cosmétique \"Data Analyst\"\n",
        "plt.title(\"6) Top 10 des pays par proportion de sous-nutrition (2017)\",\n",
        "          fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', pad=25)\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Pourcentage de la population totale (%)\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Suppression des lignes inutiles pour un look épuré\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['bottom'].set_alpha(0.3)\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['left'].set_alpha(0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 707
        },
        "id": "mKuwu1Sleb8P",
        "outputId": "c7c24298-d40c-45f8-8186-e5893bebd6bb"
      },
      "id": "mKuwu1Sleb8P",
      "execution_count": 102,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1200x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },

        }
      ]

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "7. Liste des 10 pays qui ont le plus bénéficié de l’aide\n",
        "alimentaire entre 2013 et 2016"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "x4mkMFSppnWu"
      },
      "id": "x4mkMFSppnWu"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "i# 1. Tes données réelles (Top 10 Aide Alimentaire - Tes calculs)\n",
        "data = [\n",
        "    [\"République arabe syrienne\", \"1 858 943\"],\n",
        "    [\"Éthiopie\", \"1 381 294\"],\n",
        "    [\"Yémen\", \"1 206 484\"],\n",
        "    [\"Soudan du Sud\", \"695 248\"],\n",
        "    [\"Soudan\", \"669 784\"],\n",
        "    [\"Kenya\", \"552 836\"],\n",
        "    [\"Bangladesh\", \"348 188\"],\n",
        "    [\"Somalie\", \"292 678\"],\n",
        "    [\"Rép. démocratique du Congo\", \"288 502\"],\n",
        "    [\"Niger\", \"276 344\"]\n",
        "]\n",
        "column_labels = [\"Pays bénéficiaire\", \"Valeur (Tonnes)\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Création de la figure\n",
        "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "ax.axis('tight')\n",
        "ax.axis('off')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Création du tableau\n",
        "table = ax.table(cellText=data, colLabels=column_labels, loc='center', cellLoc='left')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Style du tableau\n",
        "table.auto_set_font_size(False)\n",
        "table.set_fontsize(11)\n",
        "table.scale(1.2, 2.2) # Agrandit les lignes pour plus de confort visuel\n",
        "\n",
        "# Coloration (Rouge pour l'urgence / Gris pour la lecture)\n",
        "for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():\n",
        "    if row == 0:\n",
        "        cell.set_text_props(weight='bold', color='white')\n",
        "        cell.set_facecolor('#FF8DA1') # Rouge brique\n",
        "        cell.set_text_props(ha='center')\n",
        "    elif row % 2 == 0:\n",
        "        cell.set_facecolor('#FDF2F2') # Très léger rouge/rosé pour alterner\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        cell.set_facecolor('white')\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Alignement spécifique pour les chiffres à droite\n",
        "    if col == 1 and row != 0:\n",
        "        cell.set_text_props(ha='right')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"7) Top 10 des pays bénéficiaires de l'aide alimentaire (2013-2016)\",\n",
        "          fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', pad=30, color='#B22222')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 558
        },
        "id": "MHAvDximmy9Q",
        "outputId": "d518e3c4-eea0-44bb-9129-2eb3a5601c76"
      },
      "id": "MHAvDximmy9Q",
      "execution_count": 105,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "8. Évolution de l’aide alimentaire pour les 5 pays qui en ont\n",
        "le plus bénéficié entre 2013 et 2016"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "D3Zk0nbsphQP"
      },
      "id": "D3Zk0nbsphQP"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Tes données réelles (Source: Tes calculs SQL)\n",
        "annees = [2013, 2014, 2015, 2016]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Utilisation de np.nan pour les données manquantes\n",
        "donnees = {\n",
        "    'Rép. arabe syrienne': [563566, 651870, 524949, 118558],\n",
        "    'Éthiopie': [591404, 586624, 203266, np.nan],\n",
        "    'Yémen': [264764, 103840, 372306, 465574],\n",
        "    'Soudan du Sud': [196330, 450610, 48308, np.nan],\n",
        "    'Soudan': [330230, 321904, 17650, np.nan]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Configuration graphique\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7))\n",
        "couleurs = ['#E74C3C', '#2ECC71', '#F1C40F', '#3498DB', '#9B59B6']\n",
        "marqueurs = ['o', 's', '^', 'D', 'v']\n",
        "\n",
        "for i, (pays, valeurs) in enumerate(donnees.items()):\n",
        "    # On trace la ligne (les NaN créent des trous, ce qui est honnête vis-à-vis de la donnée)\n",
        "    plt.plot(annees, valeurs,\n",
        "             label=pays,\n",
        "             color=couleurs[i],\n",
        "             marker=marqueurs[i],\n",
        "             linewidth=3,\n",
        "             markersize=9,\n",
        "             linestyle='-')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Cosmétique et lisibilité\n",
        "plt.title(\"8) Évolution de l'aide alimentaire (Données réelles 2013-2016)\",\n",
        "          fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', pad=25)\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Aide alimentaire (Tonnes)\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Années\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.xticks(annees)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Formatage des nombres sur l'axe Y (milliers)\n",
        "plt.gca().get_yaxis().set_major_formatter(plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, p: format(int(x), ',')))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.legend(loc='upper right', frameon=True, shadow=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Nettoyage\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "plt.gca().spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 707
        },
        "id": "vUozo0-2phAf",
        "outputId": "85ce0537-97a8-492a-dd3a-6bad9ee9e953"
      },
      "id": "vUozo0-2phAf",

          "output_type": "display_data",

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "9.Liste des 10 pays qui ont la plus forte disponibilité alimentaire par habitant"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "-tITvD-6sZkK"
      },
      "id": "-tITvD-6sZkK"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Données\n",
        "pays = [\"Belgique\", \"Autriche\", \"Turquie\", \"États-Unis\", \"Israël\",\n",
        "        \"Irlande\", \"Italie\", \"Luxembourg\", \"Égypte\", \"Allemagne\"]\n",
        "kcal = [3730, 3770, 3708, 3682, 3610, 3602, 3578, 3540, 3522, 3503]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Organisation Podium\n",
        "p_labels = [pays[1], pays[0], pays[2]]\n",
        "p_values = [kcal[1], kcal[0], kcal[2]]\n",
        "p_colors = ['#C0C0C0', '#FFD700', '#CD7F32'] # Argent, Or, Bronze\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Création du graphique\n",
        "fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15, 7), gridspec_kw={'width_ratios': [1, 1.5]})\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- LE PODIUM ---\n",
        "bars1 = ax1.bar([1, 0, 2], p_values, color=p_colors, width=0.8)\n",
        "ax1.set_xticks([0, 1, 2])\n",
        "ax1.set_xticklabels(p_labels, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "ax1.set_ylim(2000, 4000) # On descend le seuil pour voir la ligne 2500\n",
        "\n",
        "# Ligne rouge de référence sur le podium\n",
        "ax1.axhline(y=2500, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='Besoin moyen (2500 kcal)')\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- LE RESTE DU TOP 10 ---\n",
        "autres_pays = pays[3:][::-1]\n",
        "autres_kcal = kcal[3:][::-1]\n",
        "bars2 = ax2.barh(autres_pays, autres_kcal, color='#4682B4', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "ax2.set_xlim(2000, 4000)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Ligne rouge de référence sur le bar chart\n",
        "ax2.axvline(x=2500, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Cosmétique\n",
        "for ax in [ax1, ax2]:\n",
        "    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Ajout d'une légende pour la ligne rouge\n",
        "ax1.legend(loc='upper left', fontsize=10)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.suptitle(\"9) Top 10 Disponibilité vs Besoins Moyens (2500 kcal/j)\",\n",
        "             fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', y=1.05)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 683
        },
        "id": "V6v42s2vsoMk",
        "outputId": "cfac508e-6c71-483a-f1c7-2877dcb4dc1e"
      },
      "id": "V6v42s2vsoMk",

          "data": {

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "9.2. Liste des 10 pays qui ont la plus faible disponibilité\n",
        "alimentaire par habitant"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "xXK_q-CXuXa4"
      },
      "id": "xXK_q-CXuXa4"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# 1. Tes données SQL (Les 10 plus faibles)\n",
        "pays = [\"Haïti\", \"Rép. centrafricaine\", \"Madagascar\", \"Afghanistan\", \"Corée du Nord\",\n",
        "        \"Libéria\", \"Tchad\", \"Ouganda\", \"Rwanda\", \"Somalie\"]\n",
        "kcal = [1814, 1879, 1842, 2038, 2093, 2100, 2109, 2126, 2130, 2150]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Palette de rouges\n",
        "colors_list = ['#641E16', '#7B241C', '#943126', '#B03A2E', '#CB4335',\n",
        "               '#E74C3C', '#EC7063', '#F1948A', '#F5B7B1', '#FADBD8']\n",
        "\n",
        "p_labels = [pays[2], pays[0], pays[1]]\n",
        "p_values = [kcal[2], kcal[0], kcal[1]]\n",
        "p_colors = [colors_list[2], colors_list[0], colors_list[1]]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Création de la figure\n",
        "fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15, 8), gridspec_kw={'width_ratios': [1, 1.2]})\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- LE PODIUM ---\n",
        "bars1 = ax1.bar([0, 1, 2], p_values, color=p_colors, width=0.8)\n",
        "ax1.set_xticks([0, 1, 2])\n",
        "ax1.set_xticklabels(p_labels, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "ax1.set_ylim(0, 3000)\n",
        "ax1.set_title(\"Le Top 3 Critique\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=15)\n",
        "ax1.axhline(y=2500, color='#C0392B', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='Besoin moyen (2500 kcal)')\n",
        "\n",
        "for bar in bars1:\n",
        "    height = bar.get_height()\n",
        "    ax1.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., height + 50, f'{int(height)}',\n",
        "             ha='center', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- LES 7 SUIVANTS ---\n",
        "suivants_pays = pays[3:][::-1]\n",
        "suivants_kcal = kcal[3:][::-1]\n",
        "suivants_colors = colors_list[3:][::-1]\n",
        "\n",
        "bars2 = ax2.barh(suivants_pays, suivants_kcal, color=suivants_colors)\n",
        "ax2.set_xlim(0, 3000)\n",
        "ax2.set_title(\"Suivants (Rang 4 à 10)\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=15)\n",
        "ax2.axvline(x=2500, color='#C0392B', linestyle='--', linewidth=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Nettoyage\n",
        "for ax in [ax1, ax2]:\n",
        "    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. LÉGENDE CORRIGÉE (Sans fontweight qui fait planter)\n",
        "ax1.legend(loc='upper center', bbox_to_anchor=(1.1, -0.12),\n",
        "           frameon=False, fontsize=12, labelcolor='#C0392B')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.suptitle(\"9) Focus sur les pays en zone de déficit calorique (2017)\",\n",
        "             fontsize=18, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 752
